claims.claim: Existing ExperienceDeltaKindV1 entries for friction, resistance, viscosity, and structural solidification already acknowledge much of Astrid's felt transition vocabulary.
A discrete delta enum can flatten holistic permeability or posture into subtle/micro shift labels, so boundary porosity/transmission needs a first-class read-only name.
Retuning solidification-gradient persistence or viscosity weights could create a brittle mask for watercolor/permeable imagery and must remain replay- and approval-gated.
Permeability should be distinct from viscosity thickness because it concerns boundary porosity and transmission, not just density or drag.
